title: EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE - 211info
text: MID-COLUMBIA CENTER FOR LIVING WASCO COUNTY EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rapid identification, support, assessment and treatment for teenagers and young adults who are experiencing the early signs of psychosis. Services include education about psychosis; medication along with medication monitoring; individual and group counseling; multi-family groups; occupational therapy; family education and support; vocational training and life-skills coaching; 24/7 crisis services; connections to community resources. 1060 Webber Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Ages 12-30 who have had a first episode of psychosis within the last 12 months or who are experiencing early at-risk symptoms for psychosis and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (541) 296-5452 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 296-5452 Weekdays Referrals (541) 296-5452 ext 4330 Crisis Hotline (541) 296-5452 Crisis Hotline (541) 296-6307 After-hours Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurances. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Hood River, Sherman, and Wasco Counties Services: Early Intervention for Mental Illness Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTIONS SERVICES CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MID-COLUMBIA CENTER FOR LIVING WASCO COUNTY
